name_en: 💰The latest runway Large Simply FENDI, classic Monogram fabric paired with dark coffee calfskin, exuding a high-end relaxed vibe. Features leather-like hardware with hand-stitched details, low-key yet eye-catching. The adjustable shoulder strap is a great addition. Handheld, crossbody, or underarm carry adapts to any style, so cool!
name_cn:
💰The latest runway Large Simply FENDI, classic Monogram fabric paired with dark coffee calfskin, exuding a high-end relaxed vibe. Model 5592. Size 34.5x4.5x20cm
